examples: Summarize the key points of the CatBrain
chat.placeholder: Ask something about the CatBrain documentation...
chat.streamError: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your message.

rag.needsProcessing: To use RAG, you first need to process your sources with an AI agent.
rag.needsProcessingDescription: RAG indexes the generated documents in a vector database so you can query them intelligently.
rag.configDescription: Index your processed documents in a vector database for intelligent querying via MCP.
rag.explanationBanner: Document v{version} will be analyzed by structure (headers, code, tables), embeddings will be generated with Ollama, and stored in Qdrant for semantic search.
rag.explanationChunking: Smart chunking: respects document structure and adapts size to content type.
rag.embeddingHelp: Open-source model running on your local GPU via Ollama. Downloads automatically if not present.
rag.mrlHelp: Reduces vector dimensions to save memory (~4x less) with minimal quality loss. Compatible models only.
rag.chunkSizeHelp: Base size. Smart chunking adapts: code/tables use 60% of base, narrative uses 140%.
rag.overlapHelp: Overlap between fragments. Prevents information from being cut between chunks.
rag.estimationBanner: Smart chunking: respects markdown headers, doesn't cut tables or code blocks, adapts size by content type.
rag.confirmReindex: This will delete the current collection and recreate it. Continue?
rag.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? This action cannot be undone.
rag.outdatedBanner: RAG is based on version v{indexedVersion} of the document.
rag.outdatedDescription: Version v{currentVersion} already exists with updated content. Re-indexing completely replaces the knowledge base with the most recent document.
rag.upToDate: The knowledge base is up to date with version v{version} of the document. Chat has access to all content.

help.title: How to configure Gmail
personalSteps: Enable 2-step verification on your Google account
Go to the App Passwords page
In the name field type DoCatFlow and click Create
Copy the 16-character password generated (shown only once)
Paste that password in the App Password field of the wizard
workspaceSteps: Enable 2-step verification on the enterprise account
Go to App Passwords with the enterprise account
Create App Password named DoCatFlow — copy the 16 characters
Log in as administrator to Google Admin
Go to Apps → Google Workspace → Gmail → Routing → SMTP relay service → Configure
Add the server's public IP (appears in test error logs as Mail relay denied [IP])
Check: Only accept mail from specified IPs + Require SMTP authentication + Require TLS encryption → Save
Wait 2-3 minutes for propagation and run the test again
warnings: The App Password is shown only once when generated — copy it before closing
Do not use the main Gmail password, only the App Password works
For Workspace: the server IP must be the public IP, not the local IP (192.168.x.x won't work)
Changes to Workspace SMTP relay take up to 5 minutes to apply

toasts.clientIdRequired: Client ID and Client Secret are required

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage API keys, models, and DoCatFlow connections.

apiKeys.title: LLM API Keys
apiKeys.description: Configure the API keys for the LLM providers you want to use. Available models depend on providers with verified keys.

processing.title: Processing
processing.description: Configure limits and behavior for source processing with LLMs.
processing.maxTokensHint: Maximum tokens sent to LLM per processing. Gemini supports ~1M, Claude ~200K, GPT-4o ~128K. Conservative value: 50000.
processing.autoTruncateHint: If the text exceeds the limit, it is truncated proportionally. If disabled, processing fails with an error.
processing.includeMetadataHint: Adds filename and type as header for each source in the prompt.

modelPricing.title: Model costs
modelPricing.description: Prices per 1M tokens to calculate estimated usage costs. Formula: (input_tokens x input_price + output_tokens x output_price) / 1,000,000

catbotSecurity.title: CatBot — Sudo Security
catbotSecurity.description: Protect advanced CatBot actions with a <mono>sudo</mono> key. When CatBot needs to execute a protected action, it will ask for the key in the chat.
catbotSecurity.minChars: Minimum 4 characters. Stored as hash (never in plain text).
catbotSecurity.sessionHint: Time after verifying the key before it expires.

toasts.minLength: Key must be at least 4 characters

catbot.title: CatBot — AI Assistant
catbot.modelHint: The model CatBot uses to respond. Models with tool-calling work better.

embeddings.title: Embedding Models

embeddings.comingSoon: Coming soon: embedding model and provider selection.

serviceCard.noEmbeddings: No embedding models — RAG won't work

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic: {name}

openclaw.purpose: Processes your documents with specialized AI agents. Without it you can't use the Process tab.

n8n.purpose: Orchestrates document sending to the agent and receives results. Without it processing cannot execute.
steps: Make sure the DoCatFlow webhook exists and is active in n8n.

qdrant.purpose: Stores vector embeddings of your documents. Without it you can't use RAG functionality.

litellm.purpose: Acts as LLM model proxy and generates embeddings for RAG. Without it agents can't reason and RAG collections can't be created.
steps: Verify the URL and API key in your .env

searxng.purpose: Self-hosted metasearch engine for web search. Aggregates multiple engines (Google, Brave, DuckDuckGo, Wikipedia). Without it local web search won't work.

summary.runTests: Run the tests to see a summary

sections.runTests: Run the tests to see results

info.staleTitle: There is new content not included in the current document.
info.staleDesc: Processing generates a new and complete document. It includes all sources marked as "Process AI". Those marked "Direct context" are added as an annex. Excluded ones are ignored.
info.staleNote: The previous document is not deleted — it remains in History.
info.upToDate: The current document (v{version}) includes all sources. If you want to regenerate it with a different agent, model, or skills, click Process. A new version will be created.

warnings.highVolume: Text volume is high. Content will be automatically truncated to fit the model. For best results, select fewer sources or use a model with extended context (claude-opus, gemini-main).
